title: Contact John Monforte
content:
Contact John Monforte


The discussion centers on a project that involves artificial intelligence and live streaming. The objective is to develop a website that seamlessly integrates live streaming with a blockchain-based system, enabling users to actively participate in the process. The precise details of the project, such as the selection of cryptocurrency and the participants in the live stream, are still under consideration.







Hello,

To ensure our understanding, please provide a concise summary of the conversation.

John Monforte
Whatever the community decides, that is the option. We then input that information into the AI on IR and proceed with the process.

You
Understood.

John Monforte
Please follow my instructions.

You
Got it.

John Monforte
And

You
That is

John Monforte
